# Readiness Assessment: Team Collaboration

**Status**: Needs Refinement
**Evaluated**: 2026-03-17

## Criteria Check

| Criterion                    | Result | Details                     |
|------------------------------|--------|-----------------------------|
| Zero uncertainty markers     | FAIL   | 1 unit with uncertainty: high (UNIT-008) |
| All units have source refs   | PASS   | All 3 units traced to inbox  |
| Unit count in range (3-8)    | PASS   | 3 units                     |
| No contradictions            | PASS   |                             |

## Recommendation

Address the following before this feature can be marked Ready:
- **UNIT-008** (Notification Delivery): Uncertainty is `high` — the notification delivery mechanism (email only vs in-app) has not been decided. Resolve this with stakeholders and update the unit to `uncertainty: none`.
